# /research — Argus Search

1. Check Argus availability: `curl -s http://localhost:8005/api/health`
2. Search: `curl -X POST http://localhost:8005/api/search -d '{"query":"TOPIC","mode":"research"}'`
3. Extract key results: `curl -X POST http://localhost:8005/api/extract -d '{"url":"URL"}'`
4. Return structured findings
